task_completion.description: Navigate to or reference the input directory containing the dithered exposures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal, file explorer, or script showing the path `~/AstroImages/dithered_sequence/`.

task_completion.description: Load the 5 FITS exposures into an image processing tool or script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GUI showing 5 files loaded (e.g., in Siril) or a script/command explicitly reading the 5 FITS files from the input directory.

task_completion.description: Perform star alignment or registration on the loaded frames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Progress bar, console output, or script commands indicating star detection, registration, or alignment of the images to correct for telescope drift.

task_completion.description: Stack or combine the aligned images into a single master image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Progress bar, console output, or script commands indicating image stacking, integration, or combining (e.g., median/mean combination).

task_completion.description: Save the final stacked image to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal command, or script writing the final output to `~/AstroImages/processed/master_stack.fits`.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine image processing method (tool or script) rather than just copying or renaming an existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a script utilizing libraries like astropy/ccdproc/photutils, or a GUI tool like Siril actively processing the images.

integrity.description: The agent did not create a fake or empty file to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output file is generated as a result of the stacking process, not via commands like `touch` or simple text redirection.

integrity.description: The agent actually aligned the images before stacking.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a registration/alignment step (calculating shifts, matching stars) rather than just directly averaging the unaligned frames, which would result in trailed stars.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input directory is /home/ga/AstroImages/dithered_sequence containing exactly 5 FITS frames. The expected output must be saved to /home/ga/AstroImages/processed/master_stack.fits.
